{"title":"Automated vault tagging pipeline (refined)","summary":"Build a system that watches vault files and auto-generates semantic tags using local LLM inference, with human review step.","body":"## Refinements

- Added human review queue before tag application
- Configurable confidence threshold for auto-apply vs queue
- Tag deduplication against existing taxonomy","risks":["Tag quality depends on model accuracy","Review queue could build up if ignored"],"benefits":["Hands-free organization","Better discoverability","Quality control via review"],"estimated_scope":"m"}
